etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "giggle" + "-y" from imitative origin (spontaneous laughter)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Spontaneous laughter quality; having playful laughter and giggly playfulness with silly presence
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Spontaneous laughter → playful laughter → contemporary giggly playfulness and giggly laughter with playful presence
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Spontaneous laughter → playful laughter → giggly playfulness → playful understanding
